de.uka.ilkd.key.proof.io.consistency

Class SimpleFileRepo

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.proof.io.consistency.AbstractFileRepo
      • de.uka.ilkd.key.proof.io.consistency.SimpleFileRepo
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    ProofDisposedListener, FileRepo

    public class SimpleFileRepo
extends AbstractFileRepo
    This FileRepo is able to build a proof bundle but is not able to guarantee consistency between the saved proof and the source code because it does not cache the source code.

    • Field Summary

      • Fields inherited from class de.uka.ilkd.key.proof.io.consistency.AbstractFileRepo

      All Methods Instance Methods Concrete Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      java.io.OutputStream createOutputStream(java.nio.file.Path path)
      This method can be used to write a file that has no counterpart outside to the FileRepo.

      Provides access to the InputStream of a file identified by an URL.
      protected java.io.InputStream getInputStreamInternal(java.nio.file.Path p)
      Can be used to get a direct InputStream to a file stored in the FileRepo.
      protected java.nio.file.Path getSaveName(java.nio.file.Path path)
      Return the save name for a given file.

    • Method Detail

      • getSaveName

        protected java.nio.file.Path getSaveName(java.nio.file.Path path)
        Description copied from class: AbstractFileRepo
        Return the save name for a given file.
        Specified by:
        getSaveName in class AbstractFileRepo
        Parameters:
        path - the given file (absolute or relative to the proof base directory)
        Returns:
        the name (may include subdirectories) the file should have in proof package, that is a path relative to the root of the package

      • getInputStreamInternal

        protected java.io.InputStream getInputStreamInternal(java.nio.file.Path p)
                                              throws java.io.FileNotFoundException
        Description copied from class: AbstractFileRepo
        Can be used to get a direct InputStream to a file stored in the FileRepo. The concrete implementation depends on the concrete FileRepo.
        Specified by:
        getInputStreamInternal in class AbstractFileRepo
        Parameters:
        p - the original path (outside the FileRepo) of the requested file
        Returns:
        an InputStream of the resource or null if it has not been stored in the FileRepo before.
        Throws:
        java.io.FileNotFoundException - if the does not file exist, is a directory, or can not be opened

      • getInputStream

        public java.io.InputStream getInputStream(java.net.URL url)
                                   throws java.io.IOException
        Description copied from interface: FileRepo
        Provides access to the InputStream of a file identified by an URL. The file is registered to the FileRepo. May return null if the url cannot be handled by this repository.
        Parameters:
        url - the URL of the file
        Returns:
        an InputStream to the file identified by the URL, or null
        Throws:
        java.io.IOException - on IO errors

      • createOutputStream

        public java.io.OutputStream createOutputStream(java.nio.file.Path path)
                                        throws java.io.FileNotFoundException
        Description copied from interface: FileRepo
        This method can be used to write a file that has no counterpart outside to the FileRepo.
        Parameters:
        path - the path of the file to store. The path must be relative to the base directory of the proof package.
        Returns:
        an OutputStream to the file in the FileRepo
        Throws:
        java.io.FileNotFoundException - if a file with the given path exists
